questions.question: James holds up which Old Testament figure as an example of patience in suffering?
questions.feedback: James points to Job's perseverance and the Lord's compassion.

questions.question: James says the prayer offered in faith will do what for the sick person?
questions.feedback: The prayer offered in faith will make the sick person well.

questions.question: James tells believers to swear oaths by heaven and earth.
questions.feedback: James says do not swear — let your yes be yes and your no be no.

questions.question: The earnest prayer of a _____ person has great power.
questions.feedback: The prayer of a righteous person is powerful and effective.

questions.question: Be patient, brothers, until the coming of the Lord, like a farmer waiting for the precious _____ of the earth.
questions.feedback: Be patient like a farmer waiting for the precious fruit of the earth.
